The '''''Visage''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] in service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Visage'' was present at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], but was usually outfitted to explore and chart unknown expanses of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Staff aboard the ship included a galactic cartography contingent; most lower-ranked Imperial officers considered being assigned to the ''Visage'' a joke duty post.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
